name: Duck Egg and Smoked Potato
steps: Cook potatoes in water with skin on.
Once potatoes are cooked remove from water and keep warm.
Peel the potatoes and blend together with the rest of the ingredients.
Pass them through a fine mesh.
Fill an iSi canister and charge twice.
Store in the water bath at 72C.
Cook the duck eggs at 62C for 1.5 hours.
Crack open the egg and place in the centre of the bowl.
Cover with the potato foam and serve.
